channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped Rubbish, 11th March
item.description:
Bags of rubbish and other items dumped at various points along the hill, by the cemetary wall.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lodge Hill, Welling
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting you did some work on that lighting in January this year, 11th March
item.description:
Lighting and camera at the back is there a reason you have put a camera in front of my home bedroom direct view to my bedroom and home. I do need to pull my curtains for light to come in my home as I have a medical condition.And your parking attendant is always ref to this. And lightning is shiny to bright at night keeping me awake same lamp post is it possible cameras are remove because of privacy to my home.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Leathwell Road, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water leak, 11th March
item.description:
Water gushing out of Thames Water leak and running down the hill. Looks like clean water. In front of Red Hill 6, right across the road from Red Hill primary school.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Hill, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Area behind bus stop, 11th March
item.description:
Disgusting, litter everywhere, never cleared!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eastway Tunnel, Hackney Wick, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside All things considered ltd, 11th March
item.description:
Blocked drain which is flooding the road. Causing disruption and heavy flooding
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Kentish Town Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive street furniture, 11th March
item.description:
There's a new cycle bay here - great :) But as you can see, a pole has been erected here with the cycle bay signs, even though there is a street lamp which would have sufficed. Could this pole be removed please and the pavement repaired?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Selective parking enforcement, 11th March
item.description:
Ongoing daily selective parking enforcement in this location. Please investigate and provide a clear explanation.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe New Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Planters, 11th March
item.description:
Side of 1 mistral

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Service Road 2, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken furniture dumped outside Dry Cleaners, 11th March
item.description:
Every few days people dump broken furniture or broken toys outside the Dry Cleaner. This time it is a sofa (or perhaps a bed?).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Venner Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several gas canisters dumped by tree and fence, 11th March
item.description:
Large gas canisters on the grass verge and by a meter box just inside Springfield Gardens from Blackbrook Lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Springfield Gardens, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th March
item.description:
Dumped 2 seater sofa and rubbish in hedges at the side of the footpath, next to the railway line, bottom of Somerfield Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sketchley Gardens, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped plastic piping at top of Homemead Road from Blackbrook Lane, 11th March
item.description:
Rubbish on grass verg by a tree, plastic piping
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homemead Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bedroom furniture /LINALE HSE N1 7QH, 11th March
item.description:
Bedroom furniture dumped by Bins LINALE HOUSE Bin area N1 7QH Also Fridge dumped by Bins at the other End

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Murray Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 11th March
item.description:
Children's toys left on verge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Main Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London

item.title: Opp. of tortilla, 11th March
item.description:
The rubbish been staying there for more than 2 days and seems so disgusting . please provide action immediately

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, The Cut, Southwark, Greater London

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 11th March

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenarm Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Fly-tipping, 11th March
item.description:
Opposite 49 Nevill Rd near the traffic filter planter.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barbauld Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Pile of Gravel making the entire pavement dirty, 11th March
item.description:
Pile of Gravel on the street, taking place of 2 cars, with out a council licence and making dirt and takes away a paid parking
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holmleigh Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of gravel, 11th March

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holmleigh Road, Hackney, London
